case_title: GIUSTI, ROBERT et al vs. SABIDO, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIUSTI, ROBERT GIUSTI, NONIE BAGNATORI, JOSEPH BAGNATORI, PAOLA LIPPI, GEORGE LIPPI, ANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT SABIDO, ROBERT RANSA CORPORATION, A CALIF CORP DBA COPIES NOW SUMMONS ISSUED
